title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 28 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 28 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 28 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/10/2021
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends, the main contract closed 683.5, an decrease of 2.36% throughout the day; the quotation in themorning was decreased by 30-40 yuan/mt over lastday; Market wait-and-see sentiment increased. PBF at Shandong port dealt 800 yuan/mt, decreased 25-45 yuan/mt over yesterday; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 810 yuan/mt, decreased 30-35 yuan/mt over yesterday.PB lump trading volumes has increased. Since 20 o ‘clock yesterday, tangshan city started heavy pollution weather II emergency response, lifting time to notice; According to SMM, during the warning period, 15 blast furnaces at 11 steel mills were involved in the suspension of production, affecting about 45,800 tons of molten iron per day.
